mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vibration_dat_data (sensor_id, device_no, file_name, file_path, file_size, sample_rate, channel_count, point_count, duration_seconds, raw_content, collect_time, create_time, deleted) VALUES (#{sensorId}, #{deviceNo}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{sampleRate}, #{channelCount}, #{pointCount}, #{durationSeconds}, #{rawContent}, #{collectTime}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT sensor_id AS sensorId, device_no AS deviceNo, file_name AS fileName, file_path AS filePath, file_size AS fileSize, sample_rate AS sampleRate, channel_count AS channelCount, point_count AS pointCount, duration_seconds AS durationSeconds, collect_time AS collectTime FROM vibration_dat_data WHERE sensor_id = #{sensorId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY collect_time DESC LIMIT 1
